goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a definitive PROMOTE/REJECT decision, then open exactly one next low-friction branch only if A1 fails promotion.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify base hours, days, thresholds, or execution logic
Nothing counts as improvement unless it passes strict additive integration, permissive integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof
Only one candidate branch open at a time; no parallel wide search
Medium-friction wave B is forbidden until A1 is closed and one low-friction branch (A2 or A3) is fully closed with no promoted candidate

slices.title: Обязательная интеграция A1 в двух режимах
slices.hypothesis: Close the main gap from v2: prove whether A1 is truly additive to the base by running both strict-additive and permissive integration modes.
slices.objective: Close the main gap from v2: prove whether A1 is truly additive to the base by running both strict-additive and permissive integration modes.
success_criteria: Complete integration picture for A1 exists with delta PnL, trades, profit factor, and drawdown vs base
evidence_requirements: Complete integration picture for A1 exists with delta PnL, trades, profit factor, and drawdown vs base

slices.title: Ownership, cannibalization и proof of new entries для A1
slices.hypothesis: Prove the nature of A1's delta: quantify overlap with base, truly new trades, replaced base trades, and coverage expansion.
slices.objective: Prove the nature of A1's delta: quantify overlap with base, truly new trades, replaced base trades, and coverage expansion.
success_criteria: Enough evidence to make a final PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT decision on A1
evidence_requirements: Enough evidence to make a final PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT decision on A1

slices.title: Финальное решение по A1
slices.hypothesis: Render a definitive verdict on A1: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST, or REJECT — no leaving the branch in limbo.
slices.objective: Render a definitive verdict on A1: PROMOTE, WATCHLIST, or REJECT — no leaving the branch in limbo.
success_criteria: A1 is closed with a final irreversible decision
evidence_requirements: A1 is closed with a final irreversible decision
